mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ig.id, ig.name, ig.head_image_thumb,igm1.remark_group_name FROM im_group ig INNER JOIN im_group_member igm1 ON ig.id = igm1.group_id AND igm1.user_id = #{userId} AND igm1.quit = 0 INNER JOIN im_group_member igm2 ON ig.id = igm2.group_id AND igm2.user_id = #{friendId} AND igm2.quit = 0 LIMIT #{page}, #{size}
